mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.executed_at as executedAt, t.coin, t.market, t.side, t.quantity, CASE WHEN t.market = 'BTC' AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CAST(REPLACE(t.price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) AS CHAR) ELSE t.price END as price, CASE WHEN t.market = 'BTC' AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CAST(REPLACE(t.total_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) AS CHAR) ELSE t.total_amount END as totalAmount, CASE WHEN t.market = 'BTC' AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CAST(REPLACE(t.fee, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) AS CHAR) ELSE t.fee END as fee, CASE WHEN t.market = 'BTC' AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) AS CHAR) ELSE t.settlement_amount END as settlementAmount, t.ordered_at as orderedAt FROM trade_history t LEFT JOIN trade_btc_history b ON DATE_FORMAT(t.executed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = b.ordered_at ORDER BY t.executed_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM trade_history ORDER BY coin

SELECT sub.coinName as "coinName", SUM(sub.val) as "totalValue", SUM(sub.qty) as "totalQuantity" FROM ( SELECT t.coin as coinName, CASE WHEN t.side = '매수' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CASE WHEN (t.market = 'BTC' OR t.market = 'btc') AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END WHEN t.side = '매도' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CASE WHEN (t.market = 'BTC' OR t.market = 'btc') AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END WHEN t.side = '입금' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CASE WHEN (t.market = 'BTC' OR t.market = 'btc') AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END WHEN t.side = '출금' THEN -(CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) + CAST(REPLACE(t.fee, ',', '') AS DOUBLE)) * CASE WHEN (t.market = 'BTC' OR t.market = 'btc') AND b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END ELSE 0 END as val, CASE WHEN t.side = '매수' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.quantity, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) WHEN t.side = '매도' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(t.quantity, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) WHEN t.side = '입금' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.quantity, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) WHEN t.side = '출금' THEN -(CAST(REPLACE(t.quantity, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) + CAST(REPLACE(t.fee, ',', '') AS DOUBLE)) ELSE 0 END as qty FROM trade_history t LEFT JOIN trade_btc_history b ON DATE_FORMAT(t.executed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = b.ordered_at
AND t.executed_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'BTC' as coinName, CASE WHEN t.side = '매수' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CASE WHEN b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END WHEN t.side = '매도' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) * CASE WHEN b.btc_price IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(REPLACE(b.btc_price, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 1 END ELSE 0 END as val, CASE WHEN t.side = '매수' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) WHEN t.side = '매도' THEN CAST(REPLACE(t.settlement_amount, ',', '') AS DOUBLE) ELSE 0 END as qty FROM trade_history t LEFT JOIN trade_btc_history b ON DATE_FORMAT(t.executed_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = b.ordered_at
AND (t.market = 'BTC' OR t.market = 'btc') AND t.coin != 'BTC'
AND t.executed_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
) sub GROUP BY sub.coinName
SELECT id as "id", ordered_at as "date", btc_price as "price" FROM trade_btc_history ORDER BY ordered_at DESC
